paper_title: OPT: Open Pre-trained Transformer Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a suite of open pre-trained transformer models ranging from 125M to 175B parameters, designed to address challenges in robustness, bias, toxicity, and computational accessibility. Leverages a unified training pipeline and best practices for efficiency
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Concatenation of RoBERTa datasets (BookCorpus, Stories, CCNews), Pile (CommonCrawl, DM Math, Project Gutenberg, HackerNews, OpenSubtitles, OpenWebText2, USPTO, Wikipedia)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding and generation, zero/few-shot learning, NLP benchmarks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, accessible, and robust large language model development for responsible AI research
raw_extraction.paper_title: OPT: Open Pre-trained Transformer Language Models

raw_extraction.paper_title: OPT: Open Pre-trained Transformer Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Replication of GPT-3 class models using open-source training strategies, including Transformer decoder architecture and large-scale pre-training on diverse, real-world text data. Emphasis on transparency in training process and carbon accounting
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Pushshift.io Reddit corpus (unmoderated social media texts)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding and generation, instruction-following, multitask learning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable open-source language modeling with robust evaluation of biases, toxicity, and safety behaviors
